name: Australian Ethical Investment Limited
analysis: AEF has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 46% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$4.3800, stop A$3.8907, target A$4.9500 (1.16:1) — then trail it.
